title: Cauldron Optimization│煉藥鍋優化
description: The liquid inside the Cauldron will remain after the Cauldron is destroyed.│煉藥鍋內的液體會在煉藥鍋被摧毀後會保留。
body:
# Function│功能
- When a Cauldron is destroyed in any way, the fluid inside remains in place; only the Cauldron itself is destroyed. This is similar to the behavior of a destroyed Waterlogged block, but this mechanism also applies to Cauldrons containing Lava and Powder Snow.│當煉藥鍋以任意方式被破壞時，煉藥鍋盛裝的流體會留在原地，只有煉藥鍋本體會被破壞掉。類似於含水方塊被破壞的行為，但是該機制也適用於盛裝熔岩和細雪的煉藥鍋。
  - Entering `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {retaining_liquid:0b}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {retaining_liquid:1b}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {retaining_liquid:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {retaining_liquid:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- The water in Cauldron will normally cause harm.│煉藥鍋中的水會正常造成傷害。
  - Enter `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {water_in_cauldron_causes_damage:0b}` to disable this feature; enter `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {water_in_cauldron_causes_damage:1b}` to enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {water_in_cauldron_causes_damage:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {water_in_cauldron_causes_damage:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- Powder in Cauldron will normally cause freezing.│煉藥鍋中的粉雪會正常造成冰凍。
  - Enter `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {powder_snow_in_cauldron_causes_damage:0b}` to disable this feature; enter `/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {powder_snow_in_cauldron_causes_damage:1b}` to enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {powder_snow_in_cauldron_causes_damage:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage cauldron_optimization:storage {powder_snow_in_cauldron_causes_damage:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
# Required Mod│所需模組
- You need to install [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data/), otherwise Powder Snow in Cauldron will not freeze the player.│你需要安裝[Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data/)，否則煉藥鍋中的粉雪不會冰凍玩家。
